user.title: Connect to Tydom hub
user.description: Enter the IP address and MAC address of your Tydom hub, along with your Delta Dore account credentials to automatically retrieve the password.

data_description.mac: Found on the sticker on the bottom of the hub — format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
data_description.host: Local IP address of the hub (e.g. 192.168.1.47)
data_description.deltadore_email: Email of the Delta Dore / Tydom app
data_description.deltadore_password: Password of the Delta Dore / Tydom app
data_description.password: Leave empty for automatic retrieval via Delta Dore account

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the hub. Check IP address, MAC address and password.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address. Expected format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
error.missing_credentials: Provide either Delta Dore credentials or the Tydom password.
error.cannot_connect_cloud: Cannot retrieve password via Delta Dore account. Check your credentials.

abort.already_configured: This Tydom hub is already configured.
